attributes.readMe:
Here is the README documentation for the CalendarCard spec:

## Summary
The CalendarCard is a card definition that represents a calendar view. It allows users to view and manage events for a particular calendar.

## Import
```javascript
import { CalendarCard } from 'http://localhost:4201/richardtan/richy-workspace/study-hub-4d8746e6-8dd6-452d-8001-6b574ea1de18/calendar/calendar';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the CalendarCard as a field within a consuming card or field, you can do the following:

```typescript
@field calendar = linksTo(CalendarCard);
```

This will allow you to associate a CalendarCard with the consuming entity.

## Template Usage
To use the CalendarCard within a template, you can do the following:

```hbs
<@fields.calendar @format="embedded" />
```

This will render the CalendarCard in its embedded format within the consuming template.
